name: finance-os
description: Personal finance app: FastAPI backend, Vite + React frontend, SQLite storage. Designed to run locally via Docker Compose or Forger.

changelog.summary: Improves FORGER Cloud release publishing diagnostics.
changes: Adds a dedicated publisher user agent for FORGER Cloud release notifications.
Reports HTTP response details when automatic release publishing fails.

changelog.summary: Fixes movement reclassification and publishes releases to FORGER Cloud.
changes: Fixes category updates when choosing a subcategory from another category.
Adds verification coverage for cross-category subcategory edits.
Publishes release metadata directly to FORGER Cloud with a signed request.

changelog.summary: Aligns backend packaging with the shared stack source layout.
changes: Moves the backend app package under backend/src for the current stack contract.
Updates service, MCP, and internal script commands to run with the src-based Python path.
Keeps Finance OS install and agent operations compatible with current Forger Desktop app runtime expectations.

changelog.summary: Marks the app as beta in Forger catalog surfaces.
changes: Adds beta metadata so Forger can label the app in catalog and installed-app cards.

changelog.summary: Adds structured MCP tools for Forger agents.
changes: Declares the Finance OS MCP server in the app manifest.
Adds structured MCP tools for categories, subcategories, movements, movement edits and deletes, and CSV imports.
Keeps Finance OS data operations behind app validations instead of direct database manipulation.

changelog.summary: Adds Codex-assisted statement imports through Forger Desktop.
changes: Routes PDF and image statement imports through Forger Desktop Codex tasks.
Declares typed prompt arguments for Codex document processing.
Shows clearer import progress and markdown-formatted Codex results.
Adds PDF text extraction support for agent-assisted imports.
Removes in-app OpenAI API key settings from the import flow.

changelog.summary: Hardens release packaging to exclude Git metadata.
changes: Excludes root and nested .git metadata from app release packages.
Adds a defensive cleanup pass before creating the release ZIP.

changelog.summary: Improves AI-assisted imports, classification consistency, and review workflows.
changes: Adds AI-assisted import and review improvements for statements and movement files.
Keeps stored movement amounts as positive magnitudes while category kind represents direction.
Enforces category and subcategory consistency across imports, edits, and verification.
Adds local data integrity verification and supporting agent guidance.
Updates Finance OS agent guidance in English with clearer user-visible capability boundaries.
Splits post-install guidance into English and Spanish documents.
Updates README documentation to match the current local app and release flow.

author: FinanceOS

catalog.short_description: Personal finance tracker with AI assistant. Your data, your machine.
catalog.description: Finance OS is a local-first personal finance app. Track income and expenses, categorize movements, import bank statements, and ask the assistant questions about your finances. Your database stays on your machine; PDFs and images you choose to process with Codex are handled through Forger Desktop.

capabilities.title: Guardar tus finanzas localmente
capabilities.description: Mantiene movimientos, categorias y presupuestos en una base de datos local.

capabilities.title: Importar archivos que eliges
capabilities.description: Carga cartolas o planillas seleccionadas por ti para convertirlas en movimientos.

capabilities.title: Usar Codex para leer documentos
capabilities.description: Procesa PDFs e imagenes mediante Codex provisto por Forger, sin API key propia dentro de la app.

promptTemplates.title: Extraer movimientos desde cartola PDF o imagen
promptTemplates.description: Lee un documento financiero compartido por el usuario, normaliza movimientos y los carga en Finance OS como pendientes de revision.
promptTemplates.prompt:
Eres el agente interno de Finance OS.

Objetivo:
Lee el documento financiero compartido por el usuario e importa sus movimientos en la base local de Finance OS.

Archivo a procesar:
{{statement}}

Nota del usuario:
{{userNote}}

Instrucciones:
1. Extrae solo movimientos visibles en el documento. No inventes filas, fechas, montos, comercios, descripciones ni categorias.
2. Normaliza los movimientos al formato esperado por el script interno import_movements.
3. Conserva trazabilidad con la descripcion original, fecha contable y fuente del documento.
4. Antes de clasificar, revisa las categorias y subcategorias disponibles con las herramientas internas de la app.
5. Si una clasificacion no es clara, usa Sin clasificar o deja el movimiento pendiente de revision segun el flujo existente.
6. Manten la regla de consistencia: si un movimiento tiene subcategoria, esa subcategoria debe pertenecer a la misma categoria.
7. Importa los movimientos en la base local usando los scripts internos de Finance OS.
8. Ejecuta las validaciones disponibles despues de importar.
9. No modifiques archivos fuera del workspace de Finance OS.
10. No expongas rutas, comandos ni detalles tecnicos en la respuesta final.

Respuesta final:
Responde solo con un resumen funcional para mostrar dentro de Finance OS: cuantos movimientos se importaron, cuantos se omitieron o fallaron, que quedo pendiente de revision, y cualquier problema concreto que el usuario deba corregir.

scripts.init_db: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/init_db.py
scripts.list_categories: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/list_categories.py
scripts.list_movements: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/list_movements.py
scripts.import_movements: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/import_movements.py
scripts.upsert_categories: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/upsert_categories.py
scripts.edit_movement: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/edit_movement.py
scripts.delete_movement: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/delete_movement.py
scripts.verify_data_integrity: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/verify_data_integrity.py
scripts.verify: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=./src uv run python scripts/verify.py
